value.textName: 816 Royal Gorge Blvd, Cañon City, CO 81212, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Royal Gorge Chamber Alliance Foundation (RGCAF) is excited to partner with the Fremont Economic Development Corporation (FEDC) and their AgStart program to produce the region's newest weekly seasonal farmers market and community gathering.  This market's new home will be in the park at the corner of US Highway 50 and CO 115 (9th Street) in front of the Royal Gorge Chamber Alliance & Foundation's new home at the historic D&RGW depot.  This structure will also feature the Royal Gorge Region Visitor & Discovery Center as well as a Colorado Welcome Center, insuring there will be plenty of traffic from both locals and visitors alike.  Together, this new facility is called Gateway Depot & Plaza, and we couldn't be more excited for you to experience this community landmark.

value.textName: 306 7th St, Glenwood Springs, CO 81601, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Glenwood Springs Market on 7th (also known as the Downtown Market) is a seasonal outdoor event featuring local produce, artisanal goods, live music, and food trucks. For the 2026 season, the market is scheduled to run every Tuesday from 4:00 PM to 8:00 PM starting June 23 through September 8, 2026.

value.textName: 117 Center Ave, Woodland Park, CO 80863, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Teller County Farmers Market Association, (TCFMA) is a 501(c)3 organization which provides a forum for sales of local produce and items associated with agriculture, gardens & food. The association, originally formed in 1990 as Woodland Park Farmers Market, is operated by volunteers and administered by a volunteer Board of Directors.  It oversees the Woodland Park Farmers' Market (Summer) and Woodland Park Holiday Market (November). MISSION: to enhance the quality of life for Teller County residents and visitors by providing access to safe and affordable produce and other food, promoting agricultural land use through a direct market for growers, encouraging organic and pesticide-free growing techniques, and fostering health and well-being through community education. The summer market has been a lively and hugely popular part of Teller County life since 1991. Products that can be found at the market include a wide variety of locally grown and produced vegetables and fruits, eggs and meats; various cheeses; locally made bread, pies & pastries, jams, honey, salsas, pickles; popcorn, lemonade, candy, high-quality locally-made crafts, and food trucks. We have Live Music each week and periodic demonstrations and educational programs. Local non-profit charitable organizations as well as other public organizations (i.e. physical and mental-health care) are well represented at our market, along with our sponsors and occasional local businesses with informational booths.

value.textName: 9288 Dorchester St, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: METRO DENVER FARMERS' MARKET is the oldest farmers' market in the Denver area. We have been in business for 48 years. Support local - over 60 vendors

value.textName: 8501 W Bowles Ave, Littleton, CO 80123, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Metro Denver Farmers' Market is the oldest farmers' market in the Denver area. We have been in business for 48 years. Our markets are farmer owned and operated! Support local - Over 50 vendors.

value.textName: 9077 W Alameda Ave, Denver, CO 80226, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Metro Denver Farmers' Market is the oldest farmers' market in the Denver area. We have been in business for 49 years. Support local!

value.textName: 8100 Piney River Ave, Littleton, CO 80125, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Metro Denver Farmers' Market is the oldest farmers' market in the Denver area. We have been in business for 49 years. Our market is farmer owned and operated. Support local - over 30 vendors!

value.textName: 150 Grand Ave, Mancos, CO 81328, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Mancos Valley Farmers Market is a friendly, intimate community gathering place for farmers and artisans to sell their outstanding locally-grown and locally made products to residents and visitors.  Live music and other entertainment are a part of the weekly market, which is located under the trees in Boyle Park and within a block or two of downtown, where folks can find restaurants, a cidery, a brewery, a print shop, an opera house and art galleries.

value.textName: 2551 E Colfax Ave, Denver, CO 80206, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: City Park Farmers Market is a growers focused market in the heart of Denver. With over 110 local farmers and food producers, this market is able to meet your weekly grocery needs. This market proudly welcomes SNAP and DUFB.

value.textName: 6935 CO-17, Alamosa, CO 81101, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Mercadillo en el Rio is a farmer's market hosted by the Rio Grande Farm Park in Alamosa every Wednesday afternoon from 3 - 7. Our market accepts SNAP and Double up food bucks. The Rio Grande Farm Park provides land for 10 different small scale farmer's from Alamosa. Each of these farmers participate in the Mercadillo and sell produce to customers that is grow just a few hundred feet away. Along with our farmers we have other vendors who provide additional food products as well as artisan crafts. A usual market consists of two vendors selling ready to eat food as well as live music performances from local musicians. The Farm Park also has a playground and public restrooms open to all who come to shop at our market.

value.textName: 100 N Public Rd, Lafayette, CO 80026, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Lafayette Farmers Market is a Sunday farmers market in Lafayette, Colorado, bringing together local farmers, food producers, and prepared food vendors in a welcoming, family-friendly setting. The market prioritizes regional agriculture, seasonal eating, and direct relationships between growers and shoppers, offering fresh produce, responsibly raised meat, dairy, baked goods, and ready-to-eat foods. More than a place to buy groceries, the Lafayette Farmers Market is designed as a gathering space—supporting small businesses, improving food access, and strengthening connections between neighbors and the people who grow and make their food. It runs from May - October. 2026 will be the second season operating.

value.textName: Ross Ave & 6th St, Alamosa, CO 81101, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Alamosa Farmers' Market is the San Luis Valley's largest and longest running Farmers' Market.  The Market is a community event offering not only a diverse group of vendors but also live music, activities for kids, and other engaging opportunities each week.  Vendors are farmers and nonfarmers and they bring a variety of foodstuffs like locally harvested produce and home baked breads, handcrafted items, and a hodge podge of unique wares that it is hard to walk away empty handed.  The Alamosa Farmers' Market is a very affordable market both for vendors and customers.  Stop by when you are in Alamosa on a Saturday from July thorough October.

value.textName: 700 4th St, Paonia, CO 81428, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
The Arbol Farmers Market is a weekly Tuesday evening market that runs from May 13th to October 14th in Paonia Town Park. This market is open from 5pm to 7:30pm for the majority of the season, and then changes to 5pm to 7pm in September.  

Since 2020, our market has been dedicated to increasing access to local food and supporting farmers across the North Fork Valley. Our market features fresh local produce, flowers, fruit, herbs, honey, meat, breads, prepared foods, farm products, artisan goods, info booths, live music from local musicians, wood-fired pizza, a locally-sourced community meal prepared by The Learning Council, and so much more! We also accept SNAP benefits and provide DoubleUp Bucks to our customers.

vendors.name: Downtown Grand Junction Market on Main

fields.name: Market name
fields.value: Downtown Grand Junction Market on Main

value.textName: 101 S 3rd St, Grand Junction, CO 81501, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Market on Main is summertime’s signature event in Grand Junction, and is a showcase of farm products from the Western Slope. The Market on Main is a summer-long community event series drawing an estimated 5,000 visitors per week. The Market features live entertainment, food trucks and fun for the whole family.

value.textName: 215 E Foothills Pkwy, Fort Collins, CO 80525, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Fort Collins Winter Farmers Market (WFM) is Northern Colorado’s destination for fresh, local food and handmade goods throughout the colder months. More than a market, it is a vibrant community hub where families, neighbors, and friends come together to shop, connect, and celebrate the best of our region. From farm-fresh produce to one-of-a-kind artisan crafts, our indoor market at Foothills Mall makes it easy to enjoy local flavors and support small businesses all winter long.

value.textName: 1019 10th St, Golden, CO 80401, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Established in 2002, the Golden Farmers Market (GFM) is a cherished community event in Golden, Colorado, managed by the Golden Chamber of Commerce.

We are dedicated to promoting food equity, enhancing community connections, and nurturing growth and innovation. As an incubator for local businesses, our vendors infuse life into Golden, helping our community thrive. The GFM is a hub for bringing people together, aptly described by our tagline, “Community Sprouting Growth.”

value.textName: Ridgway, CO 81432, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Nestled in the heart of the San Juans, the Ridgway Farmers Market is a vibrant hub of local flavor, craftsmanship, and connection. Every Friday from May through October, our charming mountain town transforms into a gathering place where locals and travelers alike can discover something fresh, fun, and authentically Colorado.

With a rotating lineup of vendors, each week brings a new experience. From freshly harvested produce and sustainable meats to baked goods, and vibrant flowers, the market offers a taste of the region’s best. You’ll also find handcrafted body care, unique artisan wares, and the kind of friendly atmosphere that turns a quick stop into a weekly ritual.

Whether you're stocking up for the weekend, hunting for the perfect gift, or just soaking up the sunshine and good vibes, the Ridgway Farmers Market is your invitation to slow down and shop local.

value.textName: 19592 E 8th Ave, Fort Morgan, CO 80701, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Fort Morgan Farmers Market began in 2023, we started our first season with 6 vendors and quickly grew it to 23 by the end of last season! We have connected with, supported and witnessed the growth of many local producers in a community that was lacking a farmers market prior to 2023. We are proud to be able to provide a consistent platform for these northeastern Colorado producers to build their network, ultimately strengthening our rural food ecosystem.

value.textName: 404 E St, Salida, CO 81201, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Foodshed Alliance facilitates a thriving local food economy by organizing and promoting Farmers Markets and Vendors. We manage the Farmers Markets in Salida, Colorado and host ShedFest, a hyper-local, end-of-the-season celebration of the region’s talents and bounty. We aim to connect, develop and promote a healthy community by strengthening relationships between local producers and consumers.

value.textName: 1101 Park Ave, Monte Vista, CO 81144, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Monte Vista Farmers Market is dedicated to bringing local (Colorado and New Mexico) foods, crafts and art to the community. We are also dedicated to helping those most in need of fresh food access be connected to local foods.

vendors.name: Backyard Market in Black Forest Farmers Market

fields.name: Market name
fields.value: Backyard Market in Black Forest Farmers Market

value.textName: 6845 Shoup Rd, Colorado Springs, CO 80908, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: A true farmers market nestled in beautiful Black Forest just north east of Colorado Springs. This vibrant, community focused market consists of farmers, ranchers, specialty food makers and bakers, artisans, live music, educational kids corner, and more!

vendors.name: Loveland West Farmers Market at JAX

fields.name: Market name
fields.value: Loveland West Farmers Market at JAX

value.textName: NOT JAX ANY MORE, 2665 W Eisenhower Blvd, Loveland, CO 80537, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: This weekday Farmers Market was started in 2018 and has been sponsored by JAX ever since. It was created in response to the need of the Loveland and surrounding community for a weekday market allowing customers to skip weekend traffic. Our Market provides the opportunity for small farmers and businesses to reach out to the community with their unique products. This Market runs every Tuesday from mid April to mid November from 9:00 A.M. to 1:00 P.M. allowing customers to experience a full growing season.

value.textName: 200 W Oak St, Fort Collins, CO 80521, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Larimer County Farmers' Market is the oldest market in northern Colorado and is celebrating its 50th season in Old Town Fort Collins. A wide variety of produce, meats, cheese, value-added, ready-to-eat, and local artist and craft vendors are featured each week. Special events occur monthly. The market is organized by CSU Extension in Larimer County - Colorado Master Gardeners and Master Food Safety advisors are on hand to answer your gardening and food preservation questions.

value.textName: 4890 Argonne Way, Denver, CO 80249, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Green Valley Ranch Farmers Market 
Town Center Park / GVR Recreation Center
4890 Argonne Way Denver 80249
(720) 619-0619
katrina@gratefulgardenllc.com
www.gvrfarmersmarket.com
www.facebook.com/GVRFarmersMarket
https://www.instagram.com/gvrfarmersmarket/ 
  
June July and August
Wednesdays nights, 5 p.m. - 8 p.m.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant flavors of the Green Valley Ranch Farmers Market, where fresh, seasonal produce meets the tantalizing tastes of local artisans. From mouthwatering Palisade Peaches to delectable Tobys Poboys, this weekly gathering is a feast for the senses. Join us every Wednesday evening from June to August, 5-8 pm, for a delightful blend of live music, free family-friendly entertainment, and an array of handcrafted goods.

SNAP/EBT welcomed.

value.textName: 1700 13th St, Boulder, CO 80302, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Join us in the heart of downtown Boulder on 13th Street (between Canyon and Arapahoe) for the longest market season in the state of Colorado. Our Boulder markets on Wednesday and Saturday offer the very best of the season—from farm fresh produce to locally raised meat, poultry, and eggs. You can also load up on bread and baked goods, plants and flowers, and Colorado-crafted specialty and ready-to-eat foods from our great vendors.

value.textName: 80 E 2nd St, Nederland, CO 80466, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Come to the mountains above the front range for a local farmers market in Nederland! Starting May 10th, every other Sunday until October 4. And mark your calendars for July 19th and October 4 for our FESTIVAL markets - a huge stage with awesome music, local alcohol vendors and of course, 70+ local artisans, farmers and more.

value.textName: Trinidad, CO 81082, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Trinidad Community Farmers Market is the place to be on Satruday mornings! Besides offering access to seasonal fresh fruit, vegetables, eggs, meat, poultry, cheese, and flowers, there is a wide variety of hand-crafted items made by local artirsts. And usually this is all accompanied by local musicians.

value.textName: 100 Elk Ave, Crested Butte, CO 81224, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Crested Butte Farmers Market is dedicated to promoting sustainable agriculture and farm-to-consumer sales within Crested Butte.  The Crested Butte Farmers Market offers organic and certified naturally grown vegetables, fruits and herbs, pasture-raised and grass-finished meats, artisanal cheese, wine, hard ciders & juices, breads, pastries, jams, jellies, pickles, cut flowers, as well as a wide assortment of locally produced arts and crafts.

value.textName: 601 N Mildred Rd, Cortez, CO 81321, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Cortez Farmers Market is the oldest on-going farmers market in the state. It began in 1973 and the founder, when available still comes to the market. This market is located next to the old courthouse. It has a good selection of produce, meats, eggs, baked goods, and different arts and crafts. New this year, we will have food trucks participating in the market.

value.textName: 259 W 9th St, Durango, CO 81301, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Durango Farmers Market | We Grow Community

The Durango Farmers Market is a nonprofit organization dedicated to supporting local agriculture, food producers, artisans, and small businesses while strengthening Southwest Colorado’s regional food system. Through vibrant marketplaces and community-centered programming, the market creates meaningful connections between growers, makers, and the community they serve.

The weekly Saturday Market runs May through October at the TBK Bank parking lot in downtown Durango and features fresh, seasonal produce, locally raised meats, value-added foods, ready-to-eat meals, artisan goods, live music, and nonprofit and community partners.

In addition, the Durango Farmers Market hosts 2nd Saturdays on Main, a monthly expanded market experience held May through October on Main Avenue. These street-closure events bring together farmers, makers, musicians, local businesses, and community partners in a walkable, festival-style setting that celebrates local food, small businesses, and downtown vitality.

📅 Saturday Market | May–September: 8:00 AM–12:00 PM | October: 9:00 AM–12:00 PM
📍 TBK Bank Parking Lot, 259 W. 9th Street, Downtown Durango

📅 2nd Saturdays on Main | May–October
📍 Main Avenue, Downtown Durango

A nonprofit marketplace where agriculture thrives, small businesses grow, and community comes together.

value.textName: 222 E Gothic Ave, Gunnison, CO 81230, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Located in the heart of downtown Gunnison, just off Main Street, the GFM hosts vegetable and fruit vendors, bakers, value added products, meats, jewelers, soap makers, and other artisans. Live music featured weekly in IOOF Park.

value.textName: 1604 N Santa Fe Ave, Pueblo, CO 81003, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Pueblo Farmers Market is an inclusive, diverse, and safe community gathering place, committed to supporting local farmers, expanding access to local food, and providing an accessible place for entrepreneurs to sell their fresh produce, handmade goods, Cottage Foods and other specialty items.  

We welcome SNAP / EBT food, Double Up Food Bucks, and Common Spirit’s Fresh to Flourish produce prescription program.  

PFM welcomes pets with well-behaved hoomans, and we are always working to bring interesting new things. Never know what you may find!  Each location has its own vibe - come and check us out!

value.textName: 2250 S Quitman Wy, Denver, CO 80219, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Harvey Park Farmers Market is a new food-focused and producer-only seasonal farmers market in the heart of Southwest Denver. With over 50 unique vendors selling locally-grown produce and locally-produced specialty and ready-to-eat food every Saturday, our goal is to be both a grocery hub and a vibrant third space for the Southwest Denver community.

vendors.name: Loveland Farmers Market at Fairgrounds Park

fields.name: Market name
fields.value: Loveland Farmers Market at Fairgrounds Park

value.textName: 700 S Railroad Ave, Loveland, CO 80537, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Loveland Farmers Market is hosted at Fairgrounds Park on Sundays 9:00A-1:00P from June through September. The market provides farm-fresh produce, baked goods, crafters, entertainment, and more. It is fun for the whole family! The market also offers special event markets with themed and children's activities. Voted one of the 10 best farmers markets in Colorado and one of the top 3 best farmers markets in NOCO Lifestyle Magazine!

value.textName: 612 Railroad Ave, Rifle, CO 81650, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: The Rifle Farmers Market is held at Heinze Park in Rifle, Co every Friday evening from 4-8 pm June-September. We have a wide variety of vendors and artisans, live music, Sprouts Corner, food vendors and beer and wine. We have become the Friday night gathering spot for our community and visitors to our beautiful city.

value.textName: E 3rd St & N Pikes Peak Ave, Florence, CO 81226, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value: Florence is a homemade and homegrown market.  We encourage local vendors to come and enjoy the market and meet their neighbors.

value.textName: Chase Tower, 333 W Hampden Ave, Englewood, CO 80110, USA

fields.name: Market Description
fields.value:
Colorado’s ONLY dedicated Gluten-Free Farmers Market is back for another incredible season! Hosted by Denver Celiacs, this one-of-a-kind community event was created to provide a safe, welcoming, and inclusive shopping experience for individuals living with celiac disease, gluten intolerance, and gluten-related disorders.

Held monthly from June through October in Englewood, Colorado, the Gluten-Free Farmers Market brings together a carefully vetted lineup of gluten-free food vendors, bakeries, food trucks, artisans, wellness brands, fresh produce growers, and small businesses from across the state. Every vendor undergoes a review process focused on gluten-free safety, ingredient transparency, and cross-contact awareness to help create a market experience the gluten-free community can trust. ()

More than just a farmers market, this event is a celebration of community, accessibility, and connection. Visitors can enjoy a vibrant atmosphere filled with delicious food, handmade goods, live experiences, and opportunities to discover local businesses that truly understand the importance of safe gluten-free living. From baked goods and prepared meals to crafts, beauty products, flowers, dog treats, coffee, and specialty products, there is something for everyone to enjoy. ()

Since launching, the market has rapidly grown into a beloved community gathering, drawing thousands of attendees and supporting dozens of local gluten-free businesses throughout Colorado. Community members and vendors alike have praised the market for creating an emotional and meaningful space where people with celiac disease and gluten sensitivities can finally shop and eat with confidence. ()

Whether you are gluten-free by medical necessity, exploring a gluten-free lifestyle, supporting a loved one, or simply passionate about shopping local, the Gluten-Free Farmers Market welcomes you to experience a safer and more inclusive way to gather, shop, and connect.

For market dates, vendor information, and event updates, visit the Gluten Free Farmer’s Market website.
